name: ChatGLM2-6B
license: Apache-2.0 (code); ChatGLM2-6B Model License for weights (free for research; free commercial use after registration)
note: Second-gen 6B chat model; FlashAttention-based context extended to 32K, +23% MMLU / +571% GSM8K over gen 1, faster INT4 inference.
tpsNote: 44.62 tok/s generating 2K tokens, measured on A100-SXM-80G (official repo); no RTX 4090 llama.cpp figure found

verificationNotes: Fully confirmed. Release date June 25, 2023 confirmed by multiple independent sources (MarkTechPost coverage dated June 28 2023 referencing the June 25 GitHub announcement) and the official ChatGLM technical report. GitHub README_EN.md table confirms MMLU 45.46 / C-Eval 50.1 / GSM8K 28.05 / BBH 30.00 verbatim, and VRAM table confirms FP16=13.1GB / INT4=5.5GB verbatim (encoding-2048-tokens column). Context extension 2K->32K (base) with 8K dialogue training confirmed. No changes made.
